description: Demo User Personas - Five realistic user profiles for testing, development, and demonstrations. Each persona represents different usage patterns and history to test various system features.
purpose: Development testing, UX validation, demo presentations, system feature testing

personas.name: Alex
personas.description: Just started using the system. No journey history. Tests cold-start recommendations and onboarding experience.

demographics.context: Young professional, new to emotional work, tech-savvy

personas.name: Jordan
personas.description: Regular user with moderate experience. Has completed several journeys with mixed results. Tests personalized recommendations and learning from history.

demographics.context: Parent, balancing family and career, interested in personal growth

test_cases: Personalized recommendations based on success history

personas.name: Morgan
personas.description: Experienced user with extensive journey history and high success rate. Tests advanced features, pattern refinement, and expert-level guidance.

demographics.context: Has done significant personal work, possibly therapy, committed to growth

emotional_profile.starting_state: Generally well-regulated, working on deeper layers

personas.name: Casey
personas.description: User who starts journeys but has difficulty completing them. Tests support escalation, difficulty calibration, and intervention points.

demographics.context: Dealing with significant challenges, may have clinical depression or anxiety, limited support

emotional_profile.starting_state: Frequently in negative emotional states, difficulty with motivation

frequently_abandoned: Intense Physical Exercise (too much energy required)
Join or Attend Community Activity (too scary)
Legacy Work: Writing Your Own Eulogy (too heavy)

personas.name: Riley
personas.description: User who has completed journeys across wide emotional range. Tests system flexibility, pattern variety, and comprehensive coverage.

demographics.context: Emotionally aware, curious, experimental, tries different approaches

categories_experienced: Places We Go When Things Are Uncertain or Too Much
Places We Go When We Fall Short
Places We Go When We're Hurting
Places We Go When Life Is Good
emotional_diversity.transition_variety: Anxiety→Calm, Shame→Self-Compassion, Grief→Peace, Loneliness→Connection, Foreboding Joy→Full Joy

favorites_per_modality.cognitive: Cognitive Defusion: Leaves on a Stream

usage_guidelines.development_testing: Use these personas to test different user journeys through the system. Each tests different features and edge cases.
usage_guidelines.demo_presentations: Use Morgan (success story) for positive demos, Alex for onboarding demos, Casey for showing support features.
usage_guidelines.data_seeding: These personas become the user_id for demo journeys in the database. Clear naming (demo-*) indicates test data.
usage_guidelines.deletion: All demo data should be easily identifiable and deletable. Never mix with real user data in production.

meta.coverage: Tests cold-start, personalization, success patterns, support needs, and system flexibility
meta.naming_convention: demo-{name}-{type} for easy identification and cleanup
